pre_tool_use.name: migration-scope-command-guard
pre_tool_use.description: Conservative command guard for AGY migration-mode tasks. The script parses hook payloads defensively and blocks clearly unsafe/off-scope shell commands.

notes: This is repo-local scaffold. If AGY hook payload schema changes, the script should fail open with a warning instead of blocking unrelated tools.
The scope validator remains the objective end-of-task gate: python3 scripts/agent_scope_validate.py path/to/scope.json
